thematic: same research lineage, different focus

tests.notes: Thompson Sampling is pipeliner-specific; no-ledge has no TS content

direct: variant comparison, memory provider axis

within_project_results.relevance: direct: local Ollama embeddings, air-gapped constraint

methodology.scoring: 0-5 per query: 5=direct dense evidence from multiple authoritative notes, 4=direct with minor gaps, 3=partial/topically adjacent, 2=thematic only, 1=sparse/weak, 0=no relevance
methodology.within_project: same-project query to KB, measures baseline evidence density
methodology.cross_project: project-B-domain query, measures whether project-A evidence helps

findings.high_transfer: architectural patterns (embedding approaches, evidence cache, KE thesis) transfer across all 3 projects — same KE stack unifies them
findings.medium_transfer: TTL/gap-fill variants from no-ledge inform pipeliner KE research; Qdrant/KB infrastructure for hermes-kb
findings.low_transfer: task-specific mechanisms (Thompson Sampling, Agent patterns) are siloed within project — no-ledge has no TS content
findings.ke_substrate_effect: all 3 projects share the KE as underlying research substrate; cross-pollination via shared infrastructure notes (KE thesis, evidence cache architecture)
